case_title: BRIDGEPORT FINANCIAL INC., A CORPORATION VS. EDWARD MILLER et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRIDGEPORT FINANCIAL INC., A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, EDWARD IND & DBA SOFTWARE RESEARCH INC. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-04-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-03-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-20-2003
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $4,815.75 AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, EDWARD IND & DBA SOFTWARE RESEARCH INC.
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRIDGEPORT FINANCIAL INC., A CORPORATION
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $149.30 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, EDWARD IND & DBA SOFTWARE RESEARCH INC.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-04-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRIDGEPORT FINANCIAL INC., A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, EDWARD IND & DBA SOFTWARE RESEARCH INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRIDGEPORT FINANCIAL INC., A CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILLER, EDWARD IND & DBA SOFTWARE RESEARCH INC. $4,537.56 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $471.44 INTEREST, $149.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,818.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, EDWARD IND & DBA SOFTWARE RESEARCH INC.
